articles.title: US Mexican food chain Chipotle to open first restaurant in Mexico - BBC

articles.description: Oil prices surged and stocks slid on Monday after President Donald Trump said he would reinstate a blockade on Iranian shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

articles.description: Trump’s plan for high gas prices is to make it look like gas prices are coming down—without them actually coming down.

articles.title: Pentagon suspends CMMC phase two requirements, launches review of program - Federal News Network
articles.description: DoD CIO Kirsten Davies is suspending plans to ramp up CMMC third-party assessments, as part of a review that casts doubt on the future of the current program.

articles.description: Gov. Gavin Newsom signed a bill that will allow California families buying their first zero-emission vehicle (ZEV) to walk into participating automakers and get an instant rebate.

articles.title: United passenger says crew ordered him to change controversial T-shirt before he could travel - Fox News
articles.description: Sam Saadeh says a United Airlines flight attendant found his anti-war shirt offensive, forcing him to change before boarding his flight to Newark.

articles.title: Feds warn banks on lending to unauthorized workers - Fox Business

articles.title: Gasoline prices projected to climb back to $4 amid 'pain at the pump' - Yahoo Finance
